role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified as having no assessment in Phase 2 due to lack of visible text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and architectural integration with the environment.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific tree species (Acer platanoides) and hedge types (Ligustrum) visible in the image.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed the blue square parking sign and storm drain grate design.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural cues (stucco, roof tiles, gates) to distinguish regional styles.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Italy. The agents provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence (architecture, specific plants, signage) that consistently pointed to Italy. The tournament correctly selected Italy over France based on the specific architectural details.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the ochre stucco, concrete walls, and deciduous trees.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified the maple and privet-like hedges.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly identified the blue square sign and drain grate.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described the specific architectural style.
